hx_brief: 54yo male comes in with diarrhea and abdominal pain x 6 months. Patient denies fever, blood in stool, PMH, or significant FMH.

hints.hx: Intermittent joint pain. Notable skin findings over shins.
hints.pe: Erythema Nodosum on the anterior shins.
hints.lab: Elevated ESR and CRP. Stool cultures negative.
hints.img: CT: Non-specific thickening of the terminal ileum.
